ruleset.name: Adobe-Official-CloudManager-Rules
ruleset.description: Adobe's official custom code quality rules from Cloud Manager. Source: https://experienceleague.adobe.com/en/docs/experience-manager-cloud-service/content/implementing/using-cloud-manager/test-results/custom-code-quality-rules These rules are enforced in Cloud Manager pipelines and reflect Adobe's engineering best practices.

rule.name: CWE-676-AvoidThreadStop
rule.message: [Adobe CQRules:CWE-676] Avoid using Thread.stop() or Thread.interrupt() — unsafe thread termination

rule.name: CWE-134-FormatStringInjection
rule.message: [Adobe CQRules:CWE-134] Prevent format string injection from external sources

property.name: xpath
property.value: //MethodInvocation[MethodName[contains(., 'format') or contains(., 'printf')]] /Arguments/ArgumentList/Expression[1][self::VariableAccess or self::FieldAccess or self::MethodInvocation]

rule.name: ConnectionTimeoutMechanism
rule.message: [Adobe CQRules:ConnectionTimeoutMechanism] CRITICAL: HTTP clients must have socket/connect timeouts (≤60s recommended) to prevent resource exhaustion

property.name: xpath
property.value: //MethodInvocation[MethodName[contains(., 'HttpClient') or contains(., 'URL') or contains(., 'URLConnection')]] [not(ancestor::MethodInvocation[MethodName[contains(., 'setTimeout') or contains(., 'setConnectTimeout') or contains(., 'setReadTimeout')]])]

rule.name: CQBP-72-CloseResourceResolver
rule.message: [Adobe CQBP-72] Always close ResourceResolver objects via try-with-resources or finally block

rule.name: CQBP-75-ResourceTypeBinding
rule.message: [Adobe CQBP-75] Use resource type binding for servlet registration instead of Sling servlet paths (@SlingServletResourceTypes)

rule.name: CQBP-71-HardcodedLibsAppsPaths
rule.message: [Adobe CQBP-71] Avoid hardcoded /libs and /apps paths; use relative paths or configuration for portability

rule.name: CQBP-44-CatchAndEitherLogOrThrow
rule.message: [Adobe CQBP-44] Log exceptions exactly once — don't both log AND throw (prevents duplication)

rule.name: CQBP-44-ConsecutivelyLogAndThrow
rule.message: [Adobe CQBP-44] Don't log immediately before throw — prevents exception duplication in logs

rule.name: CQBP-44-LogInfoInGetOrHeadRequests
rule.message: [Adobe CQBP-44] Use WARN/ERROR or DEBUG/TRACE for GET/HEAD requests, not INFO (reduces noise)

rule.name: CQBP-44-ExceptionGetMessageAsFirstLogParam
rule.message: [Adobe CQBP-44] Don't use Exception.getMessage() as first log parameter; pass exception object instead

rule.name: CQBP-44-WrongLogLevelInCatchBlock
rule.message: [Adobe CQBP-44] Catch blocks must log at WARN/ERROR level, not DEBUG or INFO

rule.name: CQBP-44-ExceptionPrintStackTrace
rule.message: [Adobe CQBP-44] Use SLF4J logging (org.slf4j.Logger), not printStackTrace()

rule.name: CQBP-44-LogLevelConsolePrinters
rule.message: [Adobe CQBP-44] Don't use System.out/System.err; use SLF4J logging framework instead

property.name: xpath

rule.name: AMSCORE-554-SlingScheduler
rule.message: [Adobe AMSCORE-554] Don't use Sling Scheduler; use Sling Scheduled Jobs instead (more cloud-native)

rule.name: InjectAnnotationWithOptional
rule.message: [Adobe] Don't use @Inject with @Optional; use @ValueMapValue or @OsgiInjector instead

rule.name: AEMSRE-870-ReuseHTTPClient
rule.message: [Adobe AEMSRE-870] Reuse HTTPClient instances at class level, not created in methods (prevents resource exhaustion)
